_comment: All creature definitions live here — logic code never hardcodes a species. `species` defines the archetypes (placeholder shape + color now, real art later: swap `shape`/`color` for a spritesheet key when art lands). `startingCreatures` is who you begin a fresh sanctuary with — spawn positions come from the landscape generator (near the center of whatever land was rolled), so there are no fixed coordinates here. `speed` is walking speed in pixels/second. `wanderRadius` is how far (in tiles) a creature roams from where it's standing when idle.

glimmer.name: Glimmer
glimmer.flavor: A gentle orb-like spirit drawn to calm places.

thorn.name: Thorn
thorn.flavor: Restless and leaf-quick — never sits still for long.

cinder.name: Cinder
cinder.flavor: Stubborn little ember that loves hard work.
